answers.where: Mine Cards Mining screen with a fixed top miner action stage, 3D KayKit/Ozz miner, generated mine floor/wall pieces, and lower idle mechanics board.
answers.action: Watch Surface Stone mining, read the geode reward pop, then follow NEXT GOAL toward Copper Pickaxe.
answers.response: The v003 pass reduces oversized FX/stage stamps, keeps the geode reward in the action stage, and rewrites the upgrade cost rows as direct Need N resource goals.
answers.reward: Stone, XP, coins, geode bonus, node unlock progress, and Copper Pickaxe costs are visible; the geode moment now has generated voxel FX instead of only a text callout.
answers.game_look: The stage now reads closer to a game action strip with real sprite/3D assets, but the lower board is still a draft repeated-card UI and not yet a polished idle RPG product screen.

issues.text: Landscape still has unused stage space and same-weight lower-board rectangles.
NEXT GOAL is clearer, but cost rows and button still need a stronger authored upgrade card treatment.
FX/stage generated crops are clean, but the board/slice9 family remains procedural/draft-level rather than final generated UI.
Actor, rock, reward and progress now read in order, but the reward still sits like a UI badge more than a physical mined payoff.

problem: Stage/FX integration improved and four-state proof is current, but the first screen still fails the product bar because lower-board hierarchy and final UI art are not polished enough.
next: Keep feature expansion frozen. Generate or accept blank UI kit/decor overlay source families for board/card/button treatment, then recapture four-shot proof and rerun product gate.
